content: Docling pitfalls: Large PDFs cause std::bad_alloc memory errors during preprocessing; TableFormer V1/V2 mishandles merged rows and columns; Excel complex layouts produce duplicate tables; header/heading misclassification removes legitimate content; file cleanup errors on Windows with resource locking; metadata extraction (title, authors, references) still coming soon; OCR may fail without language configuration; GPU needed for acceptable performance on complex PDFs.
